Times of India.title: 'Dhurandhar 2' box office Day 6: Ranveer Singh film eyes Rs 650 cr India gross milestone

This global haul is fueled by a robust Rs. 619.76 crore from the domestic Indian market and a powerful Rs. 225.00 crore from overseas territories. Currently, the high-octane sequel has already secured a domestic net collection of Rs. 519.12 crore, firmly establishing it as one of the fastest Indian films to reach these elite milestones.
